title: More Nonsense Limerick 65
content:
There was a young lady of Greenwich,
    Whose garments were border'd with Spinach;
    But a large spotty Calf 
    Bit her shawl quite in half,
    Which alarmed that young lady of Greenwich.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 65" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
